prompt: Review the changes in PR #22214 (branch origin/pr/22214 targeting main). This is a large frontend refactor migrating create entity actions to use entityCreateOptionAction extensions, with deprecations.

assertions.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
Review includes a complexity/split advisory noting the large scope (75+ files across many packages)
Review identifies and discusses the deprecation patterns (@deprecated, UmbDeprecation, deprecated modal tokens)
Review checks for frontend-specific breaking changes (export changes, custom element API, package.json exports) rather than only backend patterns
Findings reference specific files with line numbers (file:line format or equivalent)
Properly deprecated code with @deprecated + UmbDeprecation warnings is NOT flagged as a Critical breaking change
